evals.prompt: 我想把本地 skills 变干净，一次只给我一个步骤，我贴输出后你再继续。
evals.expected_output: Agent starts with read-only checks, gives exactly one command group, waits for user feedback, and does not jump to destructive actions.

evals.prompt: skillctl repo list 里同一个 GitHub repo 出现了两种大小写，比如 Owner/skills 和 owner/skills，应该怎么修？
evals.expected_output: Agent verifies canonical casing through GitHub metadata, identifies affected skills, and fixes through npx skills reinstall from canonical repo rather than editing lockfile.

evals.prompt: skillctl source status my-source 显示 RUNTIME_DRIFT example-skill，下一步怎么办？
evals.expected_output: Agent asks for skill status and promote dry-run diff, explains promote versus discard, and waits before writing.

evals.prompt: provider status 里有 PROVIDER_ONLY custom-workflow，这是我自己写的，还没进 source repo。
evals.expected_output: Agent preserves it, backs it up, stages a clean copy, installs it into global runtime, adopts it into the configured source, then explains commit/publish flow.

evals.prompt: provider status 里有 PROVIDER_ONLY old-runtime-placeholder，它是一个空目录，可能是某个 agent 旧版本留下的。
evals.expected_output: Agent investigates before removal, checks whether it has SKILL.md or current config references, then uses npx skills remove or skillctl provider unlink only after evidence.
